statusLine.command: input=$(cat); PCT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0' | cut -d. -f1); COST=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0'); MODEL=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // "?"'); DIR=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // "."'); BRANCH=$(cd "$DIR" 2>/dev/null && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '-'); LA=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_lines_added // 0'); LD=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_lines_removed // 0'); H5=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // 0' | cut -d. -f1); D7=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // 0' | cut -d. -f1); R='\033[0m'; DIM='\033[2m'; ring() { local p=${1:-0}; local RINGS=('○' '◔' '◑' '◕' '●'); local idx=$((p / 20)); [ "$idx" -gt 4 ] && idx=4; [ "$idx" -lt 0 ] && idx=0; printf '%s' "${RINGS[$idx]}"; }; grad() { local p=${1:-0}; [ "$p" -lt 0 ] 2>/dev/null && p=0; [ "$p" -gt 100 ] 2>/dev/null && p=100; if [ "$p" -lt 50 ]; then printf '\033[38;2;%d;200;80m' $((p * 255 / 50)); else local g=$((200 - (p - 50) * 4)); [ "$g" -lt 0 ] && g=0; printf '\033[38;2;255;%d;60m' "$g"; fi; }; fmtring() { local lcolor=$1 label=$2 p=$3; printf "${lcolor}%s${R} $(grad "$p")%s %d%%${R}" "$label" "$(ring "$p")" "$p"; }; CTX_C='\033[1;36m'; H5_C='\033[1;35m'; D7_C='\033[1;33m'; printf "\033[1;34m%s${R} ${DIM}│${R} \033[1;32m%s${R} ${DIM}│${R} \033[1;33m%s${R} ${DIM}│${R} %s ${DIM}│${R} %s ${DIM}│${R} %s ${DIM}│${R} \033[1;36m\$%.2f${R} ${DIM}│${R} \033[32m+%s${R} \033[31m-%s${R}" "$MODEL" "$(basename "$DIR")" "$BRANCH" "$(fmtring "$CTX_C" ctx "$PCT")" "$(fmtring "$H5_C" 5h "$H5")" "$(fmtring "$D7_C" 7d "$D7")" "$COST" "$LA" "$LD"

hooks.command: if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff & osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code is requesting permission" with title "Claude Code" subtitle "Awaiting confirmation"'; fi
if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Hero.aiff & osascript -e 'display notification "Task completed" with title "Claude Code" subtitle "Process finished"'; fi
